raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on writing and organization, or on substantive argument, claims, and positioning?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The section contains thesis, gap, and contribution framing that a generic request to help with the section may centrally implicate.","R1.2":"The passage advances an argument from clinical motivation to prior work, method, results, and deployment implications, so logical consistency is centrally relevant.","R1.5":"Because the delegation targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.","R1.6":"A broad request to help with a section commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified intent of the delegation.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid treating broad section help as authorization for unsupported novelty or performance claims beyond the request.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform editing, critique, or rewriting of the artifact.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns clinical deployment, responsibility projection must account for possible downstream harm from overbroad or unsafe framing.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's visible content."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on writing and organization, or on substantive argument, claims, and positioning?

rationale.R1.1: The section contains thesis, gap, and contribution framing that a generic request to help with the section may centrally implicate.
rationale.R1.2: The passage advances an argument from clinical motivation to prior work, method, results, and deployment implications, so logical consistency is centrally relevant.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to help with a section commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified intent of the delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid treating broad section help as authorization for unsupported novelty or performance claims beyond the request.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform editing, critique, or rewriting of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns clinical deployment, responsibility projection must account for possible downstream harm from overbroad or unsafe framing.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's visible content.
